'''nangogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobmaker|jobmaker]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobmaker|jobmaker]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nangogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nængegeth|nængegeth]] || [[word:nængegej|nængegej]] || [[word:nængegesh|nængegesh]] || [[word:nængege|nængege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangongogoth|nangongogoth]] || [[word:nangongogoj|nangongogoj]] || [[word:nangongogosh|nangongogosh]] || [[word:nangongogo|nangongogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangogoth|nangogoth]] || [[word:nangogoj|nangogoj]] || [[word:nangogosh|nangogosh]] || [[word:nangogo|nangogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangofgoth|nangofgoth]] || [[word:nangofgoj|nangofgoj]] || [[word:nangofgosh|nangofgosh]] || [[word:nangofgof|nangofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nangogotho|nangogotho]] || [[word:nangogojo|nangogojo]] || [[word:nangogosho|nangogosho]] || [[word:nangogoko|nangogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nangogoth|nangogoth]] || [[word:nangogoj|nangogoj]] || [[word:nangogosh|nangogosh]] || [[word:nangogo|nangogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nangogothol|nangogothol]] || [[word:nangogojol|nangogojol]] || [[word:nangogoshol|nangogoshol]] || [[word:nangogokol|nangogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nangogothotho|nangogothotho]] || [[word:nangogojojo|nangogojojo]] || [[word:nangogoshosho|nangogoshosho]] || [[word:nangogoko|nangogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nangogothon|nangogothon]] || [[word:nangogojon|nangogojon]] || [[word:nangogoshon|nangogoshon]] || [[word:nangogokon|nangogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nangogothoro|nangogothoro]] || [[word:nangogojoro|nangogojoro]] || [[word:nangogoshoro|nangogoshoro]] || [[word:nangogokoro|nangogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
